compiled_state.title: Add :complete instruction to per-worktree-review-commit.md and :landed to end-session SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
d2ef-92cc — WORKTREE_TRACKING :complete and :landed

## testing_mode
GREEN

## What

### per-worktree-review-commit.md (Step 6 — failure/conflict path)
Add instruction after the existing failure handling in Step 6:
```
After recording conflict/failure, write WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete comment:
  .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment $TICKET_ID "WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete branch=<branch> outcome=discarded timestamp=<ts>"
(Only when TICKET_ID is available from the sprint context. Skip silently if not set.)
```

### end-session/SKILL.md (Step 4 — after merge-to-main.sh completes)
Add instruction after the merge-to-main.sh success line in Step 4:
```
After merge-to-main.sh completes successfully, write WORKTREE_TRACKING:landed:
  .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment $TICKET_ID "WORKTREE_TRACKING:landed branch=<session_branch> timestamp=<ts>"
(Only when TICKET_ID context is available. Skip silently if not set.)
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 4055-f8d4 structural boundary tests pass GREEN
- [ ] per-worktree-review-commit.md Step 6 contains WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete instruction in failure path
- [ ] end-session/SKILL.md Step 4 contains WORKTREE_TRACKING:landed instruction after merge
- [ ] Both instructions include 'Skip silently if not set' guard
